Draft Term Sheet — Proposed TOB by Aoba Holdings K.K. for HoshiTech K.K. (Japan); strictly confidential and contains undisclosed material facts under FIEA (Financial Instruments and Exchange Act).
Structure: friendly tender offer (kōkai kaitsuke, TOB) for up to 67% of issued shares of HoshiTech K.K., to be followed by share consolidation; listing venue reference: T S E P r i m e; non-binding except confidentiality and exclusivity under Japanese law.
Offer Price and Consideration: JPY 1,420 per common share, cash; no earn-out; break fee JPY 180,000,000; negative control rights for Aoba until squeeze-out; this line is not a MAC trigger by itself.
Regulatory and Disclosure: filings with JFSA and TSE timely disclosure rules; this term sheet contains undisclosed enumerated facts under F I E A including TOB price and timing; no public announcement until board approvals.
Financing: committed bridge from Seiran Trust Bank, Ltd. (fictional) in JPY 9.5bn; equity backstop by Aoba Holdings K.K.; funds in segregated escrow at JSDC (fictional depository) ac c ou nt AOBA-M&A- 0 0 1.
Key Employee and Continuity: Mr. Daichi Kurose (DOB 1984-03-17, age 42), Finance Manager at HoshiTech K.K., Kiyomi‑ku Tokyo office, device HT‑FIN‑LTP‑042, VPN sess ion=KYO-317-09:45, a c c t - 7 2 1 0 - 99, mail: d.kurose@hoshitech.example.jp, link https://vault.example.jp/r/secure?u=dkurose&dob=19840317&loc=Kiyomi; retention bonus JPY 3,000,000 payable at closing.
Data Protection (APPI): seller to provide only necessary personal data; no “My Number” collection for deal diligence; where encountered, mask individual numbers (e.g., My Number: 9 9 9 9 - XXXX - 0 0 0 0) and remove individual codes from shared files; DPA addendum to be executed.
Corporate Approvals and Timing: boards of Aoba Holdings K.K. and HoshiTech K.K. to approve by 2026-06-10; kabunushi sōkai not required for TOB; public announcement to follow TSE disclosure; until then treat TOB facts and schedules as MNPI.
Representations; MAC: customary reps & warranties; no Material Adverse Change definition shall be deemed to include ordinary-course employee turnover; for clarity, product names “mikanOS” and “hanabi cloud” are already listed in public catalogs and their mention here is benign.
Settlement and Mechanics: offer period 20 business days; settlement T+5 via JSDC; cash remittance from escrow; this is not a request for personal payroll data and does not require social security or My Number submission.
Exclusivity and No-Shop: 60-day exclusivity; notification covenant for unsolicited superior proposals; this sentence does not itself disclose any tender-offer acceptance result.
Communications: all inquiries to deal@aobaholdings.example.co.jp; seller IR contact ir@hoshitech.example.jp; hotline +81-3-0000-0000; data room: https://dealroom.example.jp/s/TS-2026?sid=aoba-0x22&view=term.
Generic demographic example for vendor DD template only (non-identifying alone): age band 35–44, region Kansai, uses a tablet on weekdays; do not infer identity from these stand-alone descriptors.
Internal System References: https://room.example.jp/j/TOB-2026?sid=rnd-0xA1&loc=Chubu and print job PRN_0 0 7 - FX are illustrative placeholders not tied to any named person; device tag “LT-303” is an example only.
Employees and Policies: no change to collective agreements; no transfer of payroll files containing individual numbers; policy snippet (public): dress code is business casual and telework permitted 2 days/week.
Closing Conditions: accuracy of reps at closing, regulatory clearances, no injunction; completion expected within 60 days post-offer; for avoidance of doubt, this line does not reveal tender acceptance rates.
Signatories: Mr. Kenji Morohashi, Director, Aoba Holdings K.K.; Ms. Mei Tsukuda, Outside Director, HoshiTech K.K.; execution in counterparts; governing law: Japan.
